pr_title: fix: add second review_lever example to break template lock
pr_description: Add a second structurally distinct `review_lever` example to break template lock observed in runs 60–66 (90–100% of reviews started with "This lever governs the tension between X and Y") Update all three locations: `Lever.review_lever` Pydantic field, `LeverCleaned.review` field, and `IDENTIFY_POTENTIAL_LEVERS_SYSTEM_PROMPT` constant Document single-example template lock as known problem #6 in `OPTIMIZE_INSTRUCTIONS` Register `prompt_7` in prompt-lab (synced with updated system prompt)
